title: Green Core 3.5 — What's New
content:
3.5 highlights

Green Core 3.5 builds on the stable 3.0 foundation with a focus on developer experience, new pattern components, and performance improvements in the React wrapper layer.

New: Card Pattern 01 enhancements

The Card Pattern 01 component now supports a date property with built-in locale-aware formatting via the new GdsFormattedDatedate-format attribute to get localised output without any JavaScript in your template.

New: Segmented control sizes

The segmented control now supports size="small" and size="large" in addition to the default medium size, making it easier to fit into compact toolbars and spacious hero sections alike.

Improved: Dropdown performance

The dropdown's option list is now virtualised when more than 50 options are present, eliminating the rendering bottleneck that some teams encountered with large data sets.

Angular wrappers

The Angular wrapper generation pipeline has been updated to emit standalone components by default, making integration with Angular 17+ module-free architectures seamless.
